subcodes.first_line: The All-Merciful hath dawned upon thee, O thou who hast turned unto God, the Mighty, the All-Wise, through this Tablet wherewith [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد تجلی الرحمن علیک یا ایها المقبل الی الله العزیز الحکیم بهذا اللوح الذی به
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @call to action, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @predictions and prophecies
